case_title: SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES vs. SMILEY, JUANITA

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWLAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT SMILEY, JUANITA
